todos.content: Clarify IM product scope, scale targets, and core functional requirements
Identify non-functional requirements for MVP-to-ten-million evolution, latency, availability, consistency, compliance, and observability
Design high-level Go IM architecture covering gateway, routing, messaging, storage, push, and admin services
Expand detailed database table schema, Redis Key design, Kafka Topic design, and Protobuf protocol design
Add enterprise capability planning for organization structure, audit compliance, permissions, private deployment, and SSO
Add API catalog, service interface boundaries, and error code specification
Plan distributed connection management, message routing, fanout, ordering, ACK, retry, and idempotency strategies
Plan deployment topology, scaling strategy, disaster recovery, monitoring, and capacity considerations
Persist the architecture plan under `.tocodex/plans/` as a markdown file
Ask user to review the expanded plan and confirm whether changes are needed
Switch to implementation mode when the architecture plan is approved
Inspect workspace and define Go IM skeleton scope
Create Go module, service entrypoints, internal packages, protobuf stubs, configs, migrations, deployment placeholders, and docs
Run formatting and basic validation
Implement next MVP foundation: config-aware service bootstrap, health endpoints, in-memory message flow components, and unit tests
Run formatting and validation for MVP foundation
Implement MVP HTTP Message API and gateway route wiring for send/sync flows
Add JSON API models, response wrapper, HTTP tests, and run validation
Implement MVP fanout, inbox, and delivery domain components with tests
Run formatting and validation for fanout/inbox/delivery components
Implement in-memory MQ abstraction, message published events, and fanout consumer wiring
Run formatting and validation for MQ/fanout integration
Implement MVP presence, receipt, and rate limit components with tests
Run formatting and validation for presence/receipt/rate limit components
Implement MVP auth token service, HTTP auth middleware, and principal propagation tests
Run formatting and validation for auth middleware
Add auth config, login API, and protect message send/sync endpoints
Run formatting and validation for authenticated Message API
Implement enterprise in-memory directory and permission service with tests
Run formatting and validation for enterprise permission components
Implement audit event store, MQ audit consumer, and tests
Run formatting and validation for audit components
